Precision Forex Intelligence

One shot.
Perfectly placed.

Sniper 777X studies the tape so you don't have to — structure, momentum, and confluence distilled into a single, disciplined read on the market. Every trade you take gets logged, scored, and folded back into the next call.

Sniper 777X pulls live price data and computes a structured technical read for your own decision-making — it is not financial advice. Every position carries risk; size accordingly.

Pair Scanner

Every pair. One pass.

Set your timeframe, session, and duration once — Sniper 777X fetches live data for the whole pair list and runs the same 14-factor engine on each one, so you can see where the signal and accuracy line up across the board.

Scan Parameters
Set your parameters, then fetch live data for every pair before sniping.
PairSignalAccuracyStatus
Same live-data engine and 14-factor confluence read as the Signal Generator, run once per pair — not financial advice. Pairs marked WAIT or NO SETUP didn't clear the confluence/accuracy bar required to fire a call this pass.
Auto Signal Finder

Scan everything. See only what qualifies.

No parameters, no pair selection — one tap scans 8 pairs, 3 timeframes (M5, M15, H1), and 2–3 standard durations per timeframe, then surfaces only the signals that clear an 84% accuracy bar.

Full Market Scan
This checks 8 pairs × 3 timeframes (24 fetch-sets, ~90–100 live data calls) and runs sequentially to respect the data feed's rate limit — lighter than a full 15×7 pass, but still real seconds-to-minutes, not instant. Leave this tab open while it runs.
Scanning… 0 of 24 0%
No scan run yet.
Qualifying Signals
Run a scan to see every pair × timeframe × duration combo currently clearing the 84% accuracy bar, ranked highest first.
PairSignalAccuracyTimeframeDuration
Same 14-factor engine and live-data pipeline as the Signal Generator and Pair Scanner, run across every pair/timeframe/duration combo in one pass. Not financial advice — past accuracy isn't a guarantee of future performance.
Accuracy Lab

Test the signal. Track the truth.

Pick your settings and hit Execute — the engine runs a full live analysis, locks in your entry price, and starts a real countdown. When the timer expires it fetches the current price and auto-logs the trade as a WIN or LOSS. Every detail is saved so you can review the full reasoning behind each result.

SNIPER 777X
Trading involves substantial risk of loss. Sniper 777X is a decision-support tool, not licensed financial advice.

Settings

×
Include sessions in signal
When on, London/New York/Tokyo session timing affects your composite score (boosts on overlaps, penalties in dead zones). Turn off to score signals independent of session.
Use Lab data to calibrate confidence %
When on, the displayed accuracy % is adjusted toward the empirical win rate of past resolved trades that scored similarly. Doesn't change the BUY/SELL direction — only how honest the confidence number is. Turn off to always show the raw composite score.
Use Lab feedback to adjust signal weighting
When on, resolved Accuracy Lab/live trades nudge each indicator's weight based on measured accuracy — this can change the composite score and, in edge cases, the direction itself. Turn off to always use static regime-based weights, ignoring Lab feedback entirely.
Live data source
Choose which feed powers candles, signals, and the live chart. Twelve Data runs through this site's private server proxy. Deriv connects straight from your browser using your own App ID.
Deriv App ID (optional — defaults to Deriv's public demo ID)
Deriv's market-data API requires a numeric App ID on every connection. We use Deriv's public test ID (1089) automatically if you don't set your own — it works for anyone, no registration needed. Register your own free at api.deriv.com if you want it kept separate from other apps using 1089.
Model spread & slippage
When on, entry/stop/target account for a realistic fill instead of the exact quoted price — the entry zone shifts against you, the stop sits slightly further out, and the target sits slightly closer in, with the buffer sized to the pair (tighter for majors, wider for minors/gold). Turn off to use the raw, frictionless levels.
Signal factor set
Choose which factors drive the composite score and direction. Doesn't affect Risk/Reward sizing (stop & target), which always stays on.
Data & Storage
Lab trades and signal log history are kept in this browser's storage, most recent 1,000 entries each. Once a store passes that cap, the oldest batch is automatically downloaded as a JSON backup before being trimmed — so nothing's lost, just moved off-browser. You can also export a full copy any time.
Saved automatically to this browser.
